name: Collapsible Hamper Gray - Brightroom™: Light Gray Laundry Basket with Lid, 5700 Volume, 2 Handles, 26" Height
description:
Store laundry out of sight and out of mind between wash days with this simple yet stylish Collapsible Hamper from Brightroom™. Featuring a clean rectangular shape and complete with a lid to contain your laundry, this single-compartment hamper can hold up to 25 pounds to help keep laundry out of sight and keep your home tidy between washes. A built-in handle makes for easier transport, while the fabric liner is removable and washable for simple cleaning and care. Plus, the collapsible design folds up for space-saving storage when not in use.

Brightroom™ started with a simple truth: When you’ve got it together, you feel better. Our versatile designs reveal the possibility in every closet, cupboard and drawer, and work together to create brilliant ways to organize your every day.
